title: Roles
deleteConfirm: Delete the role "{{ name }}"? Users in this role lose its permissions.

form.name: Name
form.createHint: You'll choose this role's permissions on the next screen.
form.audienceHint: Which portal this role belongs to. Fixed once the role is created.
form.permissionsHint: Choose what this role can do.
form.noPermissions: No permissions are available for this portal yet.
form.systemReadonly: This role is read-only — it's a system role (it has every permission), or you don't have permission to edit roles.
form.defaultNameLocked: Built-in roles can't be renamed, but you can change their permissions.
form.nameBlank: Enter a name that isn't only spaces.
